prose:
**Furan Fukui reactivity result** — computed with chemkit `fukui-reactivity` using DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) with PySCF Mulliken charges, gas phase (`solvent: null`), parent charge 0 and multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied XYZ used as input: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (9 atoms). Cation state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion state: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Density fitting was not requested. Software version was not returned by the tool.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom 5 (C), **f+ = 1.9242931**. The same atom was also returned as the most nucleophilic site: atom 5 (C), **f− = 0.1616371**.

Per-atom Fukui descriptors, in the atom order returned by chemkit:

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | -1.3316182 | 0.08382155 | -0.62389834 | -1.4154398 |
| 2 | C | 1.2286866 | 0.089103093 | 0.65889485 | 1.1395835 |
| 3 | C | 1.2270264 | 0.089304821 | 0.65816561 | 1.1377216 |
| 4 | C | 1.9233053 | 0.161527 | 1.0424161 | 1.7617783 |
| 5 | C | 1.9242931 | 0.1616371 | 1.0429651 | 1.762656 |
| 6 | H | -1.2190639 | 0.10248412 | -0.55828991 | -1.3215481 |
| 7 | H | -1.2191056 | 0.1025135 | -0.55829603 | -1.321619 |
| 8 | H | -0.76678308 | 0.10481615 | -0.33098347 | -0.87159923 |
| 9 | H | -0.76674059 | 0.10479266 | -0.33097396 | -0.87153325 |

**Integrity:** `integrity.trustworthy = true`; status `ok`. Integrity check details returned by chemkit: `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `common header present`.

**Warnings:** no `warnings` array was returned by the tool.

**Artifacts / reproducibility:** plot written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-182907_furan_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Exact chemkit command returned: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpy0e7gz5m/live.json`. The tool result did not include an exact live `.out` log path, so I am not fabricating one.
